case_title: PUBLIX SUPER MARKETS, INC. VS. KEAS, INC.

docket_entries.description: ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100022623) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PUBLIX SUPER MARKETS, INC. SERVED SEP-01-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KEAS, INC. PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON OCT-02-2017 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT KEAS, INC.

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF PUBLIX SUPER MARKETS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KEAS, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KEAS, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT KEAS, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PUBLIX SUPER MARKETS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KEAS, INC. $693,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15,066.00 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $708,516.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
DECLARATION OF INTEREST ON JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100025899) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PUBLIX SUPER MARKETS, INC.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PUBLIX SUPER MARKETS, INC.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KEAS, INC.
